item.title: 16:23, 28 June 2026
item.description: Little bit of a contrast boop.

media:content.media:description: Some paler greens and yellows are applied to the mini for a bit of tonal variation and highlighting on various upward facing pointy bits. Really hard to tell if it’s having the desired effect when you insist on painting green while knowing you have red/green colour blindness. Why do you do that, you numpty? Blue is right there. ‘Spider-Man Noir With The Rubik’s Cube’ needs to be added to my personal Darmok language.

item.title: 11:12, 26 June 2026
item.description: Angrier rain, angrier thunder, angrier heat. The culture-shock slip into seen-on-TV weather.

item.title: 15:59, 25 June 2026
item.description: Roaming the house in a daze howling for lollies.

item.title: 18:57, 24 June 2026
item.description: Apron time.

media:content.media:description: A cream-y tabard starts to appear. Very Knights Templar-y, which is always a worry. No doubt hammered together from the very bones of his enemies, those darned teens. It just needs a few cool dinosaur stickers or something on it.

item.title: 18:44, 20 June 2026
item.description: Ahh, forgot the ‘always put their hats on so you don’t have to paint their eyeballs’ rule.

media:content.media:description: The little man has a little face, the blue of his eyes may or may not be launching an invasion of his cheekbones. Need to step up my squinting and go in for a second pass 😬

item.title: 15:43, 20 June 2026
item.description: Using this one to do a bit of airbrush practice. What do we reckon, ‘green’?

media:content.media:description: The mini’s bib, gun and chic accessories are blacked out while the armour was given an initial dark green base tone and progressively airbrushed with yellow highlights. Violet ink shades the deepest shadows.

item.title: 13:48, 20 June 2026
item.description: “Hey! What are you teens up to?”

media:content.media:description: A friendly giant space wizard arrives on the painting handle, gatling gun safely lowered, admonishing subject or subjects unseen with a raised finger. He’s wearing what appears to be a cooking apron and has presumably been interrupted while baking biscuits.

item.title: 18:13, 5 June 2026
item.description: There are bad seasons of the X-Files and then there’s… whatever this is.

media:content.media:description: Weirdly, not a parody image. Fox Mulder wielding a sword in the old west wearing laser tag armour, elbow pads, and shades.

item.title: 13:45, 5 June 2026
item.description: They were just doing their best @1moremin

item.title: 13:44, 5 June 2026
item.description:
I paused at about the halfway point of the collection in the middle of an unfortunate back-to-back run of US editions that I just couldn’t power through.

Weirdly, looking back on it, the thing I remember most is the Dinobot characterisation. In the UK run, where we first met them, they were smart, capable and profoundly anti-authority, sick of being used as other people’s weapons. The whiplash to and from the “Me am Grimlock, me am smash lolz” of the interspersed US run was quite something.

item.title: 15:53, 3 June 2026
item.description: The weather is definitely getting meaner. The sheer sound of it. Sonic boom thunder cracks, rain louder than conversation.

item.title: 13:05, 1 June 2026
item.description: The fact that I’d also somehow automatically picked up toenail clippers beforehand, thinking this was the obvious solution, should not be entered into the permanent record.

item.title: 13:03, 1 June 2026
item.description:
I managed to remember that I’d bought dedicated parcel-opening scissors about two years ago, remembered that I’d put them somewhere easy to locate, and they were actually in that place when I looked.

Is this the kind of high that normal people feel all the time?

item.title: 14:57, 30 May 2026
item.description: I’m pretty pleased with those gradients over black this time around: no airbrush, just a bit of glaze medium and multiple passes with a biggish brush.

item.title: 14:23, 30 May 2026
item.description: At some point my self-distractions will loop back on themselves and I’ll actually finish a thing. Today is not that day! 🎉 Having a play at unifying yellows and reds via purples and pinks, inspired by @minis ‘s gorgeous Howling Griffons scheme.

media:content.media:description: A black-primed Marine mini pictured against a wet palette of purples, yellows and pinks. The boots, shins and kneepads are coloured ‘yellow’ (stage right) and ‘red’ (stage left) in different combinations of that same paint set.

item.title: 20:09, 24 May 2026
item.description: I dislike the current temperature and would like to return the unused portion please.

item.title: 13:51, 23 May 2026
item.description: Boats on the lough, blooms in the bushes, buzzy things on the window.

item.title: 20:03, 18 May 2026
item.description: He’s gone for the obvious progression, folks. Skin, dagger hilt, crown. The goal is always to make painting everything else as pointlessly fiddly as possible.

media:content.media:description: Still in the sketchy phase, the bright points of the non-metallic metal are booped into some likely positions. Once again the skin highlight is probably too bright for the metal to read bright enough in comparison, we’ll see how it looks after a few passes.

item.title: 19:03, 17 May 2026
item.description: Look at that cheeky grin.

media:content.media:description: One (1) human face has been tentatively and moodily begun, skin only, and still looking as though it’s exuding its own shadow. Can a face hide inside itself?

item.title: 16:13, 17 May 2026
item.description: There’s something weirdly satisfying about painting high-contrast skin, whether Ork, bug, or Scotsman.

media:content.media:description: Wrinkles and veins and dark shadows sketched out on the hands, hopefully as though fairly starkly-lit from above, stage-right. I think this guy may be up to no good.
